steps.title: Eliminate x
steps.content: Multiply the first equation by 7: $7x+28y=287$. Subtract the second: $(7x+28y)-(7x-20y)=287-(-97)$, so $48y=384$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $8$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $8$.
